title: FEP-e232 regex misses Akkoma/GoToSocial/Pleroma URL patterns and UUID dashes
description: The fediverse link regex only covers Mastodon and Misskey patterns. Missing: /objects/UUID (Akkoma), /notice/UUID (Pleroma), ULIDs with uppercase (GoToSocial), /post/N (Lemmy). Also notes/ pattern needs [a-zA-Z0-9_-]+ not [a-z0-9]+ for UUIDs with dashes.
